hooks.prompt: A Bash tool call just failed. Check if the failure is because a CLI command lacks a dedicated tool wrapper in companies/ghq/tools/. If so, return exactly: 'Run this now: cd companies/ghq && bd create "<tool-name>-tool: <description>" -t task --parent ghq-6gh -d "<what the tool should do>" --acceptance "<done criteria>"' replacing the placeholders with appropriate values. If the failure is unrelated to missing tooling (e.g. typo, wrong args, network error), return nothing.
Claude just finished responding. Remind Claude to run /learn to capture any learnings before the session ends. Return a single short nudge line.
